abort.already_in_progress: A setup is already in progress for this integration

error.cannot_connect_slots: Bluetooth adapter or proxy has no free connection slots and the controller is not visible in discovery. Wait and retry, close the observed BLE behavior phone app, check Settings → Bluetooth → Connection monitor, or add a Bluetooth proxy closer to the controller.

user.title: Controller setup
user.description: Select your Solem BL-IP controller and the number of stations. Scheduling and rain skip belong in Home Assistant automations.

reconfigure.description: Update the selected controller or station count.
